features.label: Built-in Video Downloader (yt-dlp)
features.desc: Download videos from YouTube, Instagram, Twitter/X, TikTok, Facebook, Reddit, Vimeo, Twitch, Dailymotion, SoundCloud, Bilibili and 1000+ more sites. Powered by yt-dlp.
features.howto: Click the video icon in toolbar or press Ctrl+Shift+D to open the downloader panel.

features.label: Sidebar Panel
features.desc: Video downloader opens as a sidebar panel (same as Assistant). Webview shrinks to make room. Auto-detects video URLs from the current page — just click Fetch to load info.
features.howto: Navigate to a video page, open the panel — URL is auto-filled. Click Fetch then Download.

features.label: Quality Selector
features.desc: Choose from all available qualities — 4K, 1080p, 720p, 480p, 360p, Audio only. Pre-merged formats shown first (no ffmpeg needed). High quality formats auto-merge video+audio with ffmpeg.
features.howto: After fetching video info, select quality from the dropdown and click Download.

features.label: ffmpeg Integration
features.desc: ffmpeg is required for 1080p+ downloads (video+audio merge). Install from Settings → Video Downloader. Warning shown in panel when high quality is selected but ffmpeg is missing.
features.howto: Settings → Video Downloader → Install ffmpeg button.

features.label: Downloads Manager Integration
features.desc: Video downloads appear in the main Downloads panel with progress bar, speed, and file size. Open downloaded file directly from the downloads panel.
features.howto: Click the Downloads button in toolbar to see video download progress.

features.label: Settings → Video Downloader Section
features.desc: Dedicated settings section with yt-dlp status, ffmpeg status, install/update buttons, yt-dlp and ffmpeg paths, default quality selector.

features.label: Supported Sites Browser
features.desc: View all 1000+ supported sites in a searchable modal with favicons. Live search with highlight. Click 'View all 1000+ →' in the settings section.
features.howto: Settings → Video Downloader → View all 1000+ button.

features.label: Appearance Toggle
features.desc: Show/hide the Video Downloader button in the toolbar from Settings → Appearance.
features.howto: Settings → Appearance → Show Video Downloader Button toggle.

features.label: Settings — Video Downloader refreshes on every navigate
features.desc: yt-dlp and ffmpeg status is re-checked every time you navigate to the Video Downloader settings section.

features.label: Supported sites with real logos
features.desc: YouTube, Instagram, Twitter/X, TikTok, Facebook, Reddit, Vimeo, Twitch, Dailymotion, SoundCloud, Bilibili — all shown with their official brand icons.

features.label: Video icon across toolbar, sidebar, and settings
features.desc: Consistent video/play icon (film frame with play button) used in toolbar button, sidebar panel header, and settings section header.

features.label: Modal scrollbar themed
features.desc: Supported sites modal scrollbar matches the app's dark teal theme.

features.label: yt-dlp EBUSY error on update
features.desc: yt-dlp.exe was locked when running — update now downloads to .new file and applies on next launch if file is locked.

features.label: Only 360p showing in quality dropdown
features.desc: YouTube 1080p/720p formats are video-only — they need merging with audio. Fixed to show all available heights including video-only formats.

features.label: File size showing 0 in downloads manager
features.desc: yt-dlp reports size as string (e.g. 45.23MiB) — now parsed to bytes for proper display in downloads manager.
